description: Update SUPABASE_SETUP.md and README.md with comprehensive owner's guide for phone-based admin management, site_content table SQL, and clear auth instructions.
steps: Update SUPABASE_SETUP.md to add site_content table SQL in Step 2, ensure brand name is 'Happiness Fashion World' throughout
Replace the 'Adding new designs' section in README.md with a comprehensive 'Owner's Guide (for Happiness)' section covering phone-based admin workflow
acceptance_criteria: SUPABASE_SETUP.md includes site_content table creation SQL with RLS policies
README.md has a comprehensive Owner's Guide section explaining phone-based admin
Both files reference 'Happiness Fashion World' consistently
Instructions cover: accessing admin, auth modes, uploading photos, editing, removing, replacing, editing site text, renaming categories, QR codes
findings: Both documentation files updated successfully. SUPABASE_SETUP.md now includes full site_content table SQL with RLS policies and realtime publication. README.md has a comprehensive Owner's Guide section covering all phone-based admin operations. All em dashes replaced with double hyphens per project conventions.
